emergency_definition: Client: After-hours electrical emergencies - power outages, panel fires, sparking wires. These need immediate response. During the day we just need someone to route calls to the right department.
Client: Active sparking or arcing, electrical fire, complete power outage in a facility, exposed live wires. Anything that poses immediate danger.

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_message: Someone will call you back within 20 minutes.

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Collect name, number, and description. Confirm next-business-day followup.

call_transfer_rules.fail_action: Apologize and promise callback within 20 minutes

integration_constraints: Client: We use ServiceMax. No special restrictions on job creation.
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet after-hours. Ask purpose. Confirm emergency. Emergency: collect name/number/address → transfer to 512-555-0303. Fail: promise callback within 20 minutes. Non-emergency: collect details, confirm next-business-day followup.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Ask purpose. Collect name and number. Route emergency to 512-555-0303, non-emergency to scheduling.
notes: Auto-extracted from transcript. Review emergency_definition for completeness.
